description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a classic skate shoe silhouette, featuring a combination of light blue and navy blue panels on the upper. The shoe has a white rubber sole and a white side stripe, characteristic of the Vans Old Skool design. The upper material appears to be a mix of canvas and suede, with reinforced stitching along the toe cap and heel for durability. White laces are threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the interior is padded for comfort. The heel tab displays a red and white logo patch, while the overall construction suggests a sturdy yet flexible build suitable for urban environments. The shoe is clean and shows no visible signs of wear, indicating it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A low-top, two-tone blue sneaker with a white sole, side stripe, and white laces, featuring a classic skate shoe design and a red logo patch on the heel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white laces, and the navy blue toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white side stripe, light blue and navy blue panels, and the white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel, navy blue heel panel, and the red and white logo patch.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side stripe, color panels, and sole.
attribute_logo: Red and white rectangular patch on the heel tab
